title: The Lighthouse Keeper
subtitle: A short story about the sea, solitude, and the light that never sleeps
description: One keeper, one lamp, and a hundred nights of weather. A quiet tale about the people who hold the line so ships can find their way home.

title: A Field Guide to Wildflowers
subtitle: Spotting, naming, and loving the small blooms underfoot
description: A gentle, illustrated introduction to the wildflowers you walk past every day — where they grow, when they bloom, and how to tell them apart.

title: Notes on Building in the Open
subtitle: Small essays on shipping software you are proud of
description: A handful of honest notes on craft, momentum, and the joy of building things people actually use. Written for makers who like to work in public.
